extraction.one_line_summary: DENZ Nico won breakaway photo finish atop Moosalp after THOMAS Geraint failed to split GC group in final sprint, FULSANG retains 1-second lead
tactical_patterns: Israel Premier Tech refused to chase nine-minute break despite Maznada inclusion, prioritizing energy conservation over stage control.
THOMAS attacked final meters of summit finish attempting split but GC contenders immediately closed, suggesting pure watts insufficient on shallow gradients.
SIMMONS dropped 11.2km from summit then rejoined breakaway for sprint, revealing false selection on steady-gradient HC climbs.
INEOS burned domestiques without PIDCOCK present due COVID, exposing thin roster depth when missing single key climbing lieutenant.

rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: negative: initiated final sprint to force split but failed to create any gap, suggesting insufficient acceleration advantage over FULSANG/GITA on gradual finishes
rider_signals.SIMMONS Quinn: positive: recovered from 11.2km-out drop to contest breakaway sprint, indicating sustainable threshold superior to explosive climbing ability
rider_signals.FULSANG Jakob: positive: personally marked SCHACHMANN attack rather than using domestiques, conserving team for stage 7 while protecting one-second lead
rider_signals.MAZNADA Mattia: neutral: controlled 18km climb pace from bottom but couldn't solo clear in final 3km despite repeated attacks against weakened break
